notes: Rollback: revert v1.0.34's group coordinator routing. It was misrouting AVTransport commands (Play/Pause/Next/Prev) to a wrong IP and breaking transport control on live boards within minutes of rollout. Knob rotation/volume was unaffected. Playback commands go back to targeting the selected speaker directly, matching pre-1.0.34 behavior, until the coordinator lookup can be verified against real household topology. The Connect:Amp discovery fix and the live gesture-label UI update from v1.0.34 are kept — unrelated to the failure.
